macro.title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, and Nasdaq climb amid Apple CEO change, Warsh hearing, Iran uncertainty - Yahoo Finance
macro.summary: Tim Cook's exit as Apple CEO, Kevin Warsh's confirmation hearings, and the clouded prospects for an extension to the US-Iran truce are in focus.

macro.title: Kevin Warsh Hearing Live: Trump's Fed Chair Nominee to Face Questions from Senators — Li - WSJ
macro.summary: Watch live as Trump's Federal Reserve nominee Kevin Warsh faces questions from the Senate Banking Committee during his confirmation hearing. Follow along for live updates, news and analysis.

macro.title: Apple Bets New CEO John Ternus Will Bring Back Jobs-Era Decisiveness - Bloomberg
macro.summary: When Apple Inc. announced Monday that longtime leader Tim Cook would be replaced by John Ternus, it published an image of the two executives walking side by side at the company’s campus in Cupertino, California.

macro.title: D.R. Horton Posts Lower Profit - WSJ

macro.title: Trump says 'maybe' government should help struggling Spirit Airlines - CNBC
macro.summary: Trump told CNBC's "Squawk Box": "I think I'd love somebody to buy Spirit, as an example."
